+-------------------+:-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Class           | Tuesday & Thursday, 2:10pm -- 4:00pm, [Gladys Valley Hall](http://campusmap.ucdavis.edu/?b=178) 1010 |
| Meetings:**       |                                                                                                      |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Homework:**     | Due at 5:00pm Pacific, as a typed PDF, [uploaded to                                                  |
|                   | Canvas](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/courses/1077308/assignments) (see                                 |
|                   | [schedule](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/courses/1077308/files/folder/Logistics) for due dates).        |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Final Exam**    | **(optional)** Tuesday, June 9, 10:30am -- 12:30pm, location TBD                                     |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Primary         | Ezra Morrison, Ph.D. (he/him)                                                                        |
| Instructors:**    |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Assistant Professor of Biostatistics                                                                 |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Department of Public Health Sciences                                                                 |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | <https://demorrison.ucdavis.edu/>                                                                    |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Hilary Aralis, Ph.D. (she/her)                                                                       |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Associate Professor of Biostatistics                                                                 |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Department of Public Health Sciences                                                                 |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Instructor      | Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme/discussions) or [Canvas                   |
| Contact Info:**   | Discussions](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/courses/1077308/discussion_topics) for course content        |
|                   | questions, and [Canvas Inbox](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/conversations) for private questions.       |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Instructor      | (Morrison) Fridays, 2:00pm -- 4:00pm, [Medical Sciences 1-C](http://campusmap.ucdavis.edu/?b=102)    |
| office            | Conference Room, or [by appointment](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/conversations#filter=type=inbox).    |
| hours/study       |                                                                                                      |
| hall:**           | (Aralis) Thursdays, 10:00am -- 12:00pm, [Medical Sciences 1-C](http://campusmap.ucdavis.edu/?b=102)  |
|                   | Rm 123, or by appointment. (Starting on 4/23)                                                        |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Texts**:        | None required; see optional reference texts listed below.                                            |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Required        | You will need access to a laptop computer (Mac, Windows, or Linux). [Laptops can be borrowed from    |
| Equipment:**      | the library](https://lsit.ucdavis.edu/request-loaner-equipment).                                     |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | [Free cloud computing is available via Posit                                                         |
|                   | Cloud.](https://posit.cloud/) |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Software:**     | Instruction will be in [R](https://cran.r-project.org/) (v4.4) with                                  |
|                   | [RStudio](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/) (v2024.12.1).                                  |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **TA:**           | Sidney Parel, M.S. (they/she)                                                                        |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | Doctoral Student, Graduate Group in Epidemiology                                                     |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **TA Office       | Tuesdays, 12:00pm -- 2:00pm, [Medical Sciences 1-C](http://campusmap.ucdavis.edu/?b=102) Conference  |
| Hours:**          | Room, or [by appointment](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/conversations#filter=type=inbox).               |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **TA Contact      | Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme/discussions) or [Canvas                   |
| Info:**           | Discussions](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/courses/1077308/discussion_topics) for course content        |
|                   | questions, and [Canvas Inbox](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/conversations) for private questions.       |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Credits**       | 4 units (8 study hours per week)                                                                     |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Course          | Letter Grades, based on:                                                                             |
| Grading:**        |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - Five homeworks (5% each; 25% total)                                                                |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - Two midterms (35% each, 70% total)                                                                 |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - Five homework self-grades (1% each; 5% total)                                                      |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - Final exam (replaces average of midterm scores if higher)                                          |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Prerequisites** | All of the following (or equivalents):                                                               |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - EPI 203 (Mathematical statistical inference)                                                       |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - EPI 205 (Principles of epidemiology)                                                               |
|                   |                                                                                                      |
|                   | - STA 108 (Linear regression models)                                                                 |
+-------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
